description.ko: 음파를 시각적 건축물로 번역한 개념적 탐구입니다. 에코-0는 주파수의 보이지 않는 움직임을 포착하여 리듬을 빛과 기하학적 형상으로 변화시킵니다.
description.en: A conceptual exploration of sound waves translated into visual architecture. Echo-0 captures the invisible movement of frequency, turning rhythm into light and geometry.

prompt: Cinematic visualization of abstract sound waves, Echo-0 project, 3D parametric architecture made of glowing sound frequencies, dark minimalist background, cyan and magenta neon pulses, high-tech data aesthetic, 8k resolution, ray-traced reflections.
